title: 你平时怎么打车？
pinyin: Nǐ píng shí zěn me dǎ chē?
titleTranslation_en: How Do You Usually Get a Taxi?
description_uz: «Odatda qanday taksi chaqirasan?» — taksi ilovalari haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog telefon ilovasi (DiDi) orqali taksi chaqirish, manzil kiritish, kutish vaqti, narx hisoblash va telefonda to'lovni muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Как ты обычно вызываешь такси?» — разговор о приложениях для такси. Диалог тренирует, как вызвать такси через приложение (DiDi), ввести адрес, обсудить время ожидания, расчёт цены и оплату в телефоне. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «How do you usually get a taxi?» — a chat about ride-hailing apps. This dialogue practices calling a taxi with a phone app (DiDi), entering an address, wait times, how the price is calculated, and paying in the phone. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píng shí zěn me dǎ chē?
sentences.text_translation_en: How do you usually get a taxi?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yòng shǒu jī ruǎn jiàn dǎ chē.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я вызываю такси через приложение на телефоне.
sentences.text_translation_en: I use a phone app to get a taxi.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Dī dī Chū xíng, hěn fāng biàn de.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 输入要去的地址，然后点叫车。
sentences.pinyin: Shū rù yào qù de dì zhǐ, rán hòu diǎn jiào chē.
sentences.text_translation: Bormoqchi bo'lgan manzilni kiritasan, keyin «mashina chaqirish»ni bosasan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вводишь адрес, куда едешь, потом нажимаешь «вызвать машину».
sentences.text_translation_en: You enter the address you're going to, then tap "call a car."
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Do you have to wait long?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú yòng, fù jìn yǒu hěn duō chē.
sentences.text_translation_en: No — there are lots of cars nearby.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà jià gé zěn me suàn?
sentences.text_translation_en: So how is the price calculated?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 软件会先告诉你多少钱。
sentences.pinyin: Ruǎn jiàn huì xiān gào su nǐ duō shao qián.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Приложение сначала сообщает, сколько это будет стоить.
sentences.text_translation_en: The app tells you the price first.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Dào le zài yòng xiàn jīn fù ma?
sentences.text_translation: Yetib borgach naqd pul bilan to'lanadimi?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you pay with cash when you arrive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú yòng, zhí jiē zài shǒu jī shàng fù.
sentences.text_translation_en: No — you pay right in the phone.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 真的很方便，我也想试试。
sentences.pinyin: Zhēn de hěn fāng biàn, wǒ yě xiǎng shì shi.
sentences.text_translation: Rostdan juda qulay, men ham sinab ko'rmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Действительно удобно, я тоже хочу попробовать.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's really convenient — I want to try it too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你下一个吧，我教你怎么叫。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xià yí ge ba, wǒ jiāo nǐ zěn me jiào.
sentences.text_translation: Sen ilovani yuklab ol, men chaqirishni o'rgataman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Скачай приложение, я научу тебя, как вызывать.
sentences.text_translation_en: Download the app, and I'll teach you how to call one.
sentences.speaker: B
